source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Rashes in Children – 49
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for pediatric-rash telehealth documentation in Dubai; medication and dose passages were reviewed but deliberately not mapped.

assessment.text: Specifies visual assessment plus duration, evolution, distribution, symptoms, family history, recurrence, exposures, medication, impact, travel, allergy, and pet history.
assessment.rationale: Supports distribution, morphology, evolution, symptoms, exposures, medicines, travel, allergy, and visual assessment fields for children.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Rashes in Children – 49
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for pediatric-rash telehealth documentation in Dubai; medication and dose passages were reviewed but deliberately not mapped.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies visual assessment plus duration, evolution, distribution, symptoms, family history, recurrence, exposures, medication, impact, travel, allergy, and pet history.

assessment.text: Lists emergency and face-to-face review criteria, including confusion, stiff neck, photophobia, persistent or recurrent rash, fever, immunocompromise, and diagnostic uncertainty.
assessment.rationale: Supports fever, systemic symptoms, rapid or persistent concern, immunocompromise, and diagnostic uncertainty as clinician prompts only.
